name: Winter Squash with Cranberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Thaw winter squash if frozen.
3. Combine with egg.
4. Stir in cranberries, salt and pepper.
5. Turn into a 1 1/2 quart casserole.
6. Drizzle melted margarine over top.
7. Sprinkle with nutmeg.
8. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes.
